text:
GG0170M2_1_STP_GOAL_CD GG0170M2 Discharge Goal 1 Step Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to step over a curb or up and down one step. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to step over a curb or up and down one step. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up assistance
06 = Independent
07 = Patient refused
09 = Not
